variable.name: RtdlSetNamedSecurityInfoW
variable.type: function(pObjectName: PWideChar; ObjectType: SE_OBJECT_TYPE; SecurityInfo: Cardinal; psidOwner: Pointer; psidGroup: Pointer; pDacl: PACL; pSacl: PACL): Cardinal;

variable.name: RtdlSetWaitableTimer
variable.type: function(hTimer: Cardinal; lpDueTime: Int64; lPeriod: Integer; pfnCompletionRoutine: Pointer; lpArgToCompletionRoutine: Pointer; fResume: LongBool): LongBool;

variable.name: RtdlNetUserAdd
variable.type: function(servername: PWideChar; level: Cardinal; buf: PByte; parm_err: PDWORD): Cardinal;

variable.name: RtdlNetGroupAdd
variable.type: function(servername: PWideChar; level: Cardinal; buf: PByte; parm_err: PDWORD): Cardinal;

variable.name: RtdlNetGroupEnum
variable.type: function(servername: PWideChar; level: Cardinal; bufptr: PByte; prefmaxlen: Cardinal; entriesread: Cardinal; totalentries: Cardinal; resume_handle: PDWORD_PTR): Cardinal;

variable.name: RtdlNetLocalGroupAdd
variable.type: function(servername: PWideChar; level: Cardinal; buf: PByte; parm_err: PDWORD): Cardinal;

variable.name: RtdlNetLocalGroupEnum
variable.type: function(servername: PWideChar; level: Cardinal; bufptr: PByte; prefmaxlen: Cardinal; entriesread: Cardinal; totalentries: Cardinal; resumehandle: PDWORD_PTR): Cardinal;

variable.name: RtdlNetLocalGroupAddMembers
variable.type: function(servername: PWideChar; groupname: PWideChar; level: Cardinal; buf: PByte; totalentries: Cardinal): Cardinal;

variable.name: RtdlGetCalendarInfoA
variable.type: function(Locale: Cardinal; Calendar: Cardinal; CalType: Cardinal; lpCalData: PAnsiChar; cchData: Integer; lpValue: PDWORD): Integer;

variable.name: RtdlGetCalendarInfoW
variable.type: function(Locale: Cardinal; Calendar: Cardinal; CalType: Cardinal; lpCalData: PWideChar; cchData: Integer; lpValue: PDWORD): Integer;

variable.name: RtdlEnumCalendarInfoExW
variable.type: function(lpCalInfoEnumProc: CALINFO_ENUMPROCEXW; Locale: Cardinal; Calendar: Cardinal; CalType: Cardinal): LongBool;

variable.name: RtdlGetVolumeNameForVolumeMountPointW
variable.type: function(lpszVolumeMountPoint: PWideChar; lpszVolumeName: PWideChar; cchBufferLength: Cardinal): LongBool;
